name: brandenburger-schraubenwerk-mcp
description: MCP server for the Brandenburger Schraubenwerk catalogue. Exposes a single tool, create_offer, that produces a binding quotation for any SKU in the catalogue, with volume-tier discounts and live shipping/delivery estimates.

tools.name: create_offer
tools.description: Create a binding offer / quotation for a quantity of a catalogued SKU. Returns total, terms, validity, and accept_url.

_note: This file is served at the legacy path /.well-known/mcp.json as an alias for /.well-known/mcp/server-card.json. The two contain identical content. Both paths are advertised because the well-known convention for MCP discovery is still emerging — different agents probe different paths.
